name: Portfolio Risk Copilot
description: Read-only risk audit of a connected OKX trading account: concentration risk, leverage risk, and smart-money positioning divergence. Does not audit third-party wallet addresses and cannot place, cancel, or transfer anything.

mode.description: Only own_account is supported — this ASP audits the account it is authenticated as, never an arbitrary wallet address.

profile_mode.description: live requires ALLOW_LIVE=true on the deployment (disabled by default for safety).

profile.description: API-key profile name from ~/.okx/config.toml, if using API-key auth instead of OAuth.

inst_type.description: Optional filter for the leverage/positions check.
